name_en: 👑 Chanel 23P New Handle Series WOC Release, fell in love at first sight💕 Imported oil-waxed top-layer cowhide, smooth and delicate texture. First is the comfortable feel, super good☑️ The appearance needs no saying, just buy it blindly and you won't go wrong. It is also versatile, achieving the effects of single shoulder, crossbody, underarm, and handbag 📷 Simply a blessing〰️ Very exquisite, worth collecting 🔝 Dimensions: 19x12cm, Colors: Black/White/Green/Silver, Model: 1135
